# H-M3 Context: P(True) Logprob Elicitation
# Generated by Phase 2C step-01 JIT from 02b_verification_plan.md

## Hypothesis Info
- **ID:** h-m3
- **Type:** MECHANISM (Step 3 of 4)
- **Statement:** Under zero-shot P(True) prompting for each (problem, solution) pair, if logprob(True) and logprob(False) are extracted and normalized as c = logprob(True)/(logprob(True)+logprob(False)), then confidence values are non-degenerate (std(c) > 0.05 for all 3 models), because Run 3 validated P(True) values of 0.57–0.91 for all 3 model families.
- **Gate:** MUST_WORK
- **Prerequisites:** h-m2 (COMPLETED, PASS)

## Experimental Setup (from Phase 2A via Phase 2B)

**Dataset:**
- Name: EvalPlus (HumanEval+ 164 + MBPP+ 378 via evalplus Python package)
- Type: programmatic-api
- Source: Liu et al. NeurIPS 2023; https://github.com/evalplus/evalplus
- Path: auto (pip install evalplus; uses tier data from h-m2/results/tier_assignments.csv)
- Hypothesis Fit: Provides real (problem, solution) pairs with known correctness — enables P(True) elicitation with ground-truth labels for secondary correlation analysis

**Model:**
- Name: NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B, codellama/CodeLlama-7b-hf, deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-6.7b-base
- Type: HuggingFace CausalLM (inference-only for P(True) logprob extraction)
- Source: HuggingFace Hub (cached from h-m1/h-m2)
- Hypothesis Fit: Run 3 confirmed P(True) values 0.57–0.91 for these 3 models; reuse enables controlled comparison

## Baseline & Comparison

**Baseline:** Degenerate confidence distribution (std(c) ≤ 0.05) — null hypothesis that logprob extraction produces uninformative outputs
**Target:** std(c) > 0.05 for ALL 3 models (non-degenerate confidence signals)

## Dependencies and Gate Conditions

**Prerequisites:**
- h-m2: COMPLETED, PASS (tier_assignments.csv available)
- h-m1: COMPLETED, PASS (solutions and pass@1 values available)

**Gate:** MUST_WORK — std(c) > 0.05 for all 3 models
**Fail Action:** Try alternative prompt; if still degenerate → PIVOT

## Key Variables
- IV: P(True) prompt format (zero-shot "Is this solution correct? True/False")
- DV: Distribution of c values; std(c) per model
- CV: Zero-shot format only; same 3 models; logprob extraction via output_logits=True
